title: vernonia poskeana var. centauroides
intro: Vernonia poskeana var. centauroides, also known as Tournesol or Yellow Ironweed, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and parts of the southwestern United States. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant has been traditionally used to treat fever, headache, and respiratory issues, as well as to reduce inflammation and improve digestive health. Herbal preparations of Vernonia poskeana var. centauroides can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal benefits.
